title: Kashmir
description: Snow-dusted valleys, houseboat evenings, Gulmarg views, and postcard silence.

title: Manali
description: Snow points, Solang Valley, Kasol, Kullu, Shimla, and mountain days with friends.

title: Do Dham Yatra
description: Kedarnath and Badrinath darshan with assisted travel, food, stay, and transport.

title: Goa
description: Golden beaches, hidden cafes, boutique stays, and the soft chaos of celebration.

title: Gokarna Dandeli
description: Beaches, river adventure, Netrani island vibes, guides, food, and group energy.

title: Ooty Coonoor
description: Toy train moments, tea gardens, Isha Yoga Center, misty roads, and scenic calm.

title: Ladakh
description: High passes, blue lakes, monastery mornings, and once-in-a-lifetime road memories.
